hero.title: Make Your Elevator
hero.subtitle: Peak-hour auto-coordination, access-control-triggered dispatch, comfort-first in the morning rush, energy-first at all other times. Breathe new life into existing buildings.

problem.title: Traditional Elevators Are Quietly Eroding Your Building's Value
problem.subtitle: Every day, congestion, waste and complaints chip away at tenant satisfaction and property premiums

items.title: Peak Congestion
items.desc: Average 60-90s wait during rush hour; tenant complaints remain persistently high

items.title: Energy Waste
items.desc: Traditional elevators run empty up to 40% of the time; elevators account for 3-8% of total building energy

items.title: Inefficient Dispatch
items.desc: Each car runs independently with no awareness of traffic flow; multiple cars travel the same direction empty

items.title: Rental Value Impact
items.desc: Slow elevators has become a significant negative factor in office lease renewal decisions

solution.title: One System, Four Upgrades
solution.subtitle: Non-destructive retrofit - add control modules with no business downtime

items.title: Peak Coordination
items.desc: Auto-detects traffic; multi-car coordination during peak, independent energy-saving mode off-peak

items.title: Access Dispatch
items.desc: Entry card tap instantly dispatches elevator; passengers grouped by floor to reduce stops

items.title: Smart Display
items.desc: In-car screens show real-time status, destination floors and current operating mode

items.title: Energy Priority
items.desc: Outside morning rush, switches to energy mode: batch passengers, reduce empty runs, smart standby

features.title: Sense in Real Time, Respond Dynamically
features.subtitle: The system continuously collects traffic data, responds in milliseconds, and optimises around the clock

items.title: Real-Time Traffic
items.desc: Camera + access-control data fusion gives instant per-floor occupancy

items.title: Smart Dispatch Engine
items.desc: Dynamically calculates optimal dispatch based on current floor distribution - millisecond response

items.title: Auto Mode Switch
items.desc: Peak to coordination mode / Off-peak to energy mode, fully automatic, no manual intervention

items.title: Management Dashboard
items.desc: Operations reports, energy stats, fault alerts - property managers see everything in one screen

access_control.title: By the Time You Walk In, the Elevator Is Already Waiting
access_control.subtitle: Integrated with existing building access control for elevator-arrives-before-you-do experience

steps.title: Badge In
steps.desc: Employee or visitor taps card at building entrance

steps.title: Floor Recognition
steps.desc: System reads personnel profile and retrieves target floor

steps.title: Smart Dispatch
steps.desc: Dispatch engine assigns optimal elevator based on current traffic

steps.title: Elevator Ready
steps.desc: Car arrives in advance; drastically reduces wait time

access_control.note: Compatible with Hikvision, Dahua, Suprema and other major access control systems - no hardware replacement required

display.title: Transparency Builds Confidence
display.subtitle: Every car has a display screen that shows real-time information, eliminating uncertainty

items.title: Destination Floors
items.desc: Shows planned stops for this car - passengers know at a glance

items.title: Operating Mode
items.desc: Coordination mode / energy mode switch shown live

items.title: Estimated Wait
items.desc: Real-time ETA reduces anxiety

items.title: Property Announcements
items.desc: Scrolling notices, emergency alerts, ad content management

schedule.title: Comfort First in the Morning Rush, Energy First the Rest of the Day
schedule.subtitle: The system automatically switches strategy by time slot - balancing experience and efficiency

energy.title: Not Just Cost Savings - A Green Asset
energy.subtitle: Quantified benefits based on industry benchmarks for a typical office building retrofit

stats.label: Tenant satisfaction uplift
stats.note: Fast elevators becomes a lease renewal positive

energy.note: * Figures based on publicly available industry benchmarks; actual results depend on building scale and usage.

howworks.title: Non-Destructive Retrofit - As Little As 48 Hours Per Car
howworks.subtitle: Modular add-on installation; phased rollout with zero downtime

steps.title: Site Survey
steps.desc: Engineers visit to assess elevator make/model, access control system and network environment

steps.title: Custom Solution
steps.desc: Tailored dispatch strategy and hardware BOM based on floors, number of cars and daily traffic

steps.title: Hardware Installation
steps.desc: Control module, sensors and display screen fitted; approximately 4-8 hours per car

steps.title: System Integration
steps.desc: Connect to access control, configure dispatch algorithm parameters, full-system testing

steps.title: Go Live & Handover
steps.desc: System launches, property team trained, Year 1 service period begins

value.title: Not Just an Elevator Upgrade - A Building Asset Enhancement
value.subtitle: Three dimensions of value, hitting exactly what property decision-makers care about most

items.title: Better Tenant Experience
items: Smart building as a differentiated selling point

bizmodel.title: One Investment, Long-Term Support
bizmodel.subtitle: Project-based delivery + annual service - smart elevators keep creating value for you

phases.title: Hardware + Development
items: Control modules, sensors, display screens and other hardware
Integration with existing access control / BMS

phases.title: Annual Maintenance Service
items: Property operations team training and support

bizmodel.note: 💡 Pricing is customised based on building scale (floors x number of cars). Contact us to schedule a free site survey.

pricing.title: Transparent Pricing, Tailored to Your Needs
pricing.subtitle: Reference pricing for 4 freight elevators + 1 passenger elevator. Final pricing subject to on-site survey.

items: Elevator vendor protocol integration (open API required)

pricing.note: ⚠️ Software pricing assumes elevator vendor provides open dispatch interface (Modbus / BACnet or proprietary protocol docs). Additional cost may apply for protocol reverse engineering.

roadmap.title: From Contract to Full Operation - Typically 4-6 Weeks

items.title: Survey & Solution Sign-off
items.desc: Site assessment, custom solution, contract signing

items.title: Hardware Procurement & Installation
items.desc: Equipment delivered; control modules and display screens fitted in phases

items.title: Integration & System Test
items.desc: Access control connection, dispatch algorithm configuration, full-system testing

items.title: Trial Run & Handover
items.desc: 1-week trial operation, parameter fine-tuning, formal handover and annual service start

cta.title: Let Your Building Run Smart - Starting Today
cta.subtitle: Book a free on-site survey. Our engineers will assess retrofit feasibility and ROI for your specific building.
